Related Entities

  • hospital CALVERTHEALTH MEDICAL CENTER 5-star overall rating
  • snf CALVERT COUNTY NURSING CTR. 3-star, 149 beds
  • snf SOLOMONS NURSING AND REHAB CENTER 1-star, 95 beds
  • snf ASBURY SOLOMONS 5-star, 48 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
